title: Morning Comment What Do You Do When The Only Game In Town Is A Bad One
section_path: Morning Comment What Do You Do When The Only Game In Town Is A Bad One
section_path_text: Morning Comment What Do You Do When The Only Game In Town Is A Bad One
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Markets crashed at the back end of last week, as US inflation surprised again on the upside, registering a new cycle-high. The S&P 500 is back below 4000 points, as investors are pricing in a more aggressive policy stance. Frankly, we are somewhat surprised also.
